name: NIGHTMARE CRITTERS✧. ┆Go camping!!
description:
" Let's go camping!!! "

✮⋆˙ You are a member of the Nightmare Critters, and everyday you and your gang need to deal with the stupid smiling critters...they're all so happy and ANNOYING...y'all are just tired and pissed off. So one day y'all decided to go camping!! Maybe that will help to clean your minds...
